who: medical billing coordinators in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For medical billing coordinators in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient reporting causes billing delays. We automate daily appointment scheduling reports instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient reporting of daily appointment schedules leading to delays in billing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing coordinators with demo video
Participate in community forums for medical billing tools
try_it: Let users try daily report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedule presets for users
Allow CSV import for existing data integration
Enable one-click export of simple reports
